title: confirm actions settings change on their own
creator: jordan.leigh6
content: I have my settings to confirm deletion in message view, but not from notifications. I've had to re-set them several times over the past month or so because it keeps changing back to confirm deletion from notifications. I think it's happening when I need to restart my phone, but it does it at random too. How do I fix that?

content: How do I Install outlook calendar extension?
